task_description: Consensus-plan the Session/ThreadPool/Job boundary refactor into a new argus-thread-pool crate, using the deep-interview spec as source of truth.

review_summary.architect_round_1: ITERATE on seam split, SessionId contradiction, ownership inversion, session migration scope
review_summary.critic_round_1: REJECT on migration order, SessionId contradiction, shallow alternatives, weak verification

final_decision: Stage the extraction: test first, invert root ownership, split helper seams and session-owned ThreadSessionIndex, introduce argus-thread-pool for pure pool-core, preserve session_id compatibility via adapter outside pool-core.
residual_risk: none blocking; protocol cleanup intentionally deferred
